channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Best Kindle Accessories (2026): Cases, Page Turners, Stickers
item.description: Looking to better protect your Kindle or add a little personality to your favorite e-reader? From cases and covers to page-turners and even charms, this is the guide for you.

item.title: Ce géant TV de Hisense (85″, 165 Hz, Dolby Atmos) s’allège de 200 euros chez Darty
item.description: Le Hisense 85U7Q Pro est un TV pensé pour toute la famille puisqu'il conviendra aux spectateurs, mais aussi aux gamers grâce au VRR et à l'AMD FreeSync. Pour le rendre plus abordable, il passe de 1 799 euros à 1 599 euros chez Darty.

item.title: The Smart Bird Feeders Everyone’s Talking About (and Actually Buying) (2026)
item.description: These bird feeders come with cameras and connected apps to let you see and learn about the birds in your neighborhood.

item.title: How to watch Chelsea vs Leeds: Live Streams, TV Channels for FA Cup semi-final
item.description: All the ways to watch Chelsea vs Leeds live streams online and from anywhere for FREE, in the FA Cup semi-final at Wembley.

item.title: The Best Permanent Outdoor Lights (2026): Govee, Eufy, Cync
item.description: Permanent eave lights that attach to the exterior of your home are becoming more popular. But are they worth the effort and cost?

item.title: Microsoft hit pause on carbon removal purchases. Now what?
item.description: The nascent industry just lost its biggest buyer, at least temporarily. But some carbon removal technology is designed to survive without corporate support. News that Microsoft was reportedly planning to pause its carbon removal purchases has rocked the still-nascent carbon removal industry. The company helped drive the market: In fiscal year 2025 alone, it made deals with 21 companies around the world to remove a record 45 million tons of CO2....

item.title: Ikea's New Blow-Up Chair Was Tested by Cats
item.description: Part of the new PS 2026 collection, it's taken the Swedish company 26 years to finally nail inflatable furniture.

item.title: I took over 2,000 photos with the incredibly versatile Oppo Find X9 Ultra — here are my favorites, including portraits, long exposures and panoramas
item.description: I used the Oppo Find X9 Ultra for a month as my primary phone, taking over 2,000 photos and videos. Here are my favorites

item.title: Tim Cook quitte la présidence d’Apple, fuite ANTS, Bouygues hausse prix, test du Oppo Find X9 Ultra : L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Cette semaine, l’actualité tech a été marquée par des sujets très variés : politique et Apple, cybersécurité en France, hausse de prix chez les opérateurs, mais aussi nouveaux smartphones et innovations hardware. Voici l’essentiel des articles les plus lus sur Frandroid.

item.title: S26 Ultra, Pixel 10, iPhone 17 Pro : le Honor 600 les bat tous dans notre test labo sur la luminosité
item.description: Le Honor 600 atteint un pic lumineux impressionnant de 5918 cd/m², surpassant non seulement ses concurrents, mais aussi les smartphones les plus hauts de gamme du marché. Cette performance est particulièrement utile pour une utilisation en extérieur sous une forte luminosité, bien que le pic soit fugace. Cette performance ne semble pas impacter l'autonomie du Honor 600 qui reste correcte....
